properties.natural_input: invariant "two different requesters are never granted at the same time"

args.name: Grant signal for requester 1 in a mutual-exclusion control condition.
Grant signal for requester 2 in a mutual-exclusion control condition.

properties.natural_input: forbid "any state that represents lost commits is reached"

left.name: The current high-level Git workflow state of the repository.

right.name: A violation state indicating commits were lost.

properties.natural_input: forbid "an operation rewrites commits that are already published"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A rebase action that rewrites commits already published to a remote repository.

properties.natural_input: forbid "a merge operation is performed"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A merge action.

properties.natural_input: require "the repository is in detached-head mode" -> "pushing is not allowed"

left.name: The current repository operation mode.

right.name: A detached-head repository mode.

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A normal push action to the remote repository.

properties.human_intent: Main branch protected from direct commit
properties.natural_input: require "the current branch is main" -> "direct commit is not allowed"

left.name: The currently active branch classification.

right.name: The main branch.

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A direct commit action on the current branch (as modeled in this workflow).

properties.natural_input: forbid "the local and remote histories are diverged"

left.name: The current synchronization relation between local and remote history.

right.name: A synchronization status where local and remote histories have diverged.

properties.natural_input: require "a push is attempted" -> "the local branch is ahead of remote"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A normal push action to the remote repository.

left.name: The current synchronization relation between local and remote history.

right.name: A synchronization status where local history is ahead of remote history.

properties.natural_input: forbid "a rebase failure occurs while histories are diverged"

left.name: The divergence-condition indicator for local versus remote history.

right.name: A divergence flag indicating the histories are in a diverged condition.

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A failed rebase outcome/action indicator.

properties.natural_input: no_transition "state where immediate force-push is required" -> "violation state for missing immediate force-push"

left.name: The current high-level Git workflow state of the repository.

right.name: A workflow state in which an immediate force push is required.

left.name: The current high-level Git workflow state of the repository.

right.name: A violation state indicating that a required immediate force push was missed.

properties.natural_input: require "a force-push is requested" -> "the actor is authorized"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A force-push action.

left.name: The current authorization status for sensitive operations.

right.name: An authorized/authenticated status allowing the guarded action.

properties.natural_input: bounded "number of unpublished commits" <= 8

left.name: The number of unpublished commits currently in scope.

properties.natural_input: require "a force-push is requested" -> "the actor has maintainer role"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A force-push action.

left.name: The role assigned to the acting user.

right.name: A maintainer-level role.

properties.natural_input: require "current branch is protected" -> "normal push is not allowed"

left.name: The currently active branch classification.

right.name: A protected-branch classification.

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A normal push action to the remote repository.

properties.natural_input: forbid "force-push is attempted on a protected branch"

left.name: The currently active branch classification.

right.name: A protected-branch classification.

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A force-push action.

properties.natural_input: require "repository is detached" -> "commit is not allowed"

left.name: The current repository operation mode.

right.name: A detached-head repository mode.

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A direct commit action on the current branch (as modeled in this workflow).

properties.natural_input: require "a rebase is requested" -> "branch is not already synchronized"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A rebase action is requested/started.

left.name: The current synchronization relation between local and remote history.

right.name: A synchronization status where no rebase is needed (already synchronized).

properties.human_intent: Push only when network is available
properties.natural_input: require "a push is attempted" -> "network is online"

left.name: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.

right.name: A normal push action to the remote repository.

left.name: The current network availability status for remote operations.

right.name: A network status indicating remote connectivity is available.

properties.natural_input: bounded "number of retries" <= 3

left.name: The number of retry attempts used by the workflow operation.

properties.natural_input: bounded "pending queue depth" <= 64

left.name: The current depth of pending operations in the processing queue.

format_note: All symbol identifiers in AST name fields are replaced by explicit natural-language explanations.

symbol_explanations.state: The current high-level Git workflow state of the repository.
symbol_explanations.event: The current Git workflow action/event being attempted at this step.
symbol_explanations.sync: The current synchronization relation between local and remote history.
symbol_explanations.divergence: The divergence-condition indicator for local versus remote history.
symbol_explanations.auth: The current authorization status for sensitive operations.
symbol_explanations.role: The role assigned to the acting user.
symbol_explanations.network: The current network availability status for remote operations.
symbol_explanations.count: The number of unpublished commits currently in scope.
symbol_explanations.retry_count: The number of retry attempts used by the workflow operation.
symbol_explanations.queue_depth: The current depth of pending operations in the processing queue.
symbol_explanations.grant1: Grant signal for requester 1 in a mutual-exclusion control condition.
symbol_explanations.grant2: Grant signal for requester 2 in a mutual-exclusion control condition.
symbol_explanations.ViolationLost: A violation state indicating commits were lost.
symbol_explanations.RB_pub: A rebase action that rewrites commits already published to a remote repository.
symbol_explanations.PU: A normal push action to the remote repository.
symbol_explanations.CO: A direct commit action on the current branch (as modeled in this workflow).
symbol_explanations.Diverged: A synchronization status where local and remote histories have diverged.
symbol_explanations.Ahead: A synchronization status where local history is ahead of remote history.
symbol_explanations.Div: A divergence flag indicating the histories are in a diverged condition.
symbol_explanations.NeedImmediateForcePush: A workflow state in which an immediate force push is required.
symbol_explanations.ViolationMissedImmediateForcePush: A violation state indicating that a required immediate force push was missed.
symbol_explanations.Auth: An authorized/authenticated status allowing the guarded action.
symbol_explanations.Clean: A synchronization status where no rebase is needed (already synchronized).
symbol_explanations.Online: A network status indicating remote connectivity is available.
